overview.description: Industrial machine vision platform — AI camera + software for automated visual inspection
overview.description_long: Robopipe is a brand of KOALA42 s.r.o. that offers an end-to-end industrial machine vision solution combining ruggedized AI cameras with a no-code platform to Capture, Label, Train and Deploy computer vision models at the edge. The Robopipe Kit includes an IP65-rated 12 MPx industrial camera with depth sensing and IR illumination, paired with a Linux-based controller that runs inference fully offline. Target use cases include defect detection, object detection and counting, OCR/barcode reading, and robot guidance across manufacturing, pharma, agriculture, and logistics.

history.origin_story: KOALA42 s.r.o. was incorporated on 2018-02-07 in Prague. Robopipe is their industrial machine vision brand, developed to replace repetitive manual inspection labour in industrial settings.

key_milestones.event: KOALA42 s.r.o. incorporated in Praha 8 - Karlín
Robopipe Kit (IP65 AI camera + controller) launched publicly

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Robopipe's value proposition is hardware-software integration — a ruggedized IP65 industrial AI camera with offline edge inference. Foundation models cannot replace the physical device or the certified industrial-grade hardware stack; their software moat is reinforced by proprietary edge deployment and tight PLC/controller integration.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Industrial machine vision is a large and growing market, but it is served by well-funded incumbents such as Cognex, Keyence, and SICK. Robopipe differentiates via open developer tooling and a full kit approach, but it is a small player competing against global leaders with established sales channels.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No external funding has been identified; Robopipe appears to be a product line of a bootstrapped Czech software studio (KOALA42, 11-50 employees). Without disclosed revenue or investment, the runway for scaling hardware R&D and manufacturing is uncertain.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: The hardware+software integration provides a real moat against AGI commoditization, but high funding risk and intense competition from global machine vision incumbents temper the outlook. Success depends on securing industrial design wins and building a recurring software subscription stream.

metadata.notes: Robopipe is a product brand of KOALA42 s.r.o. (IČO 06841945), incorporated 2018-02-07, Praha 8 - Karlín. KOALA42 also has an office in Zlín. No CNAIP entry found for Robopipe.
